<p>Responsibilities:<br>- Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Performance Max)<br>- Improve ROAS and reduce CPA<br>- Analyze data and scale high-performing campaigns</p> <p>Requirements:<br>- Proven experience managing real ad budgets<br>- Strong understanding of ROAS, CPA, and conversion tracking<br>- Experience with GA4 and GTM</p> <p>To apply, please include:<br>- Highest monthly ad budget managed<br>- Example of campaign results (ROAS or CPA)<br>- Industries you have worked with</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a and Accounts Payable / Accounts Receivable Sales and Marketing Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5130/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Brooklyn, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.tortugaforma.co">https://www.tortugaforma.co</a> </p> <p>Tortuga Forma is hiring for a motivated Sales &amp; Operations Assistant seeking steady work to support a long-term career in administration and/or sales. This is a part-time, remote role requiring 10 - 15 hours per week. We are looking for a longer term commitment of 2+ years.</p> <p>We are:</p> <ul> <li> <p>A small team of focused individuals who believe that regular and clear communication is the key to our company's success.</p> </li> <li> <p>Dedicated to training and supporting each other to achieve team and personal goals</p> </li> <li> <p>Cheerleaders who celebrate team and individual wins</p> </li> <li> <p>Inspired by contemporary design, informed by historical design, and excited by online retail.</p> </li> </ul> <p>You are:</p> <ul> <li> <p>A self-starter who can work and think independently, is highly organized, and detail-oriented</p> </li> <li> <p>Rigorous at following up and love solving problems and troubleshooting for customers</p> </li> <li> <p>Willing to take challenges head-on, both big and small</p> </li> <li> <p>Someone who asks thoughtful questions, open to receiving feedback, and is eager to learn</p> </li> <li> <p>Reliable at showing up for meetings, accountable to responsibilities and tasks</p> </li> </ul> <p>Sales &amp; Operations Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Order logistics such as entry, tracking, and maintenance</p> </li> <li> <p>Work with the warehouses to obtain shipping quotes, stock level accuracy, and ensure orders are fulfilled properly and on time.</p> </li> <li> <p>Dropship account maintenance including: allocating inventory, reporting on SKU sell through velocity across 2 - 3 key dropship accounts, addressing late shipments and customer queries, tracking returns.</p> </li> <li> <p>New dropship account setup including creating the catalog (image specs, product descriptions), learning backend systems, ensuring all information is accurately reflected on partner sites.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Identification of sales opportunities across wholesale and seasonal dropship marketing opportunities with initial outreach and follow ups.</p> </li> <li> <p>Resolving DTC customer issues, returns processing, and issuing refunds after returns have been received.</p> </li> <li> <p>Monthly data sorting to match dropship and wholesale sales&nbsp; with payouts received each month.</p> </li> <li> <p>Use of Quickbooks Online for dropship payment matching for AR</p> </li> </ul> <p>Requirements:</p> <ul> <li> <p>1-2 years of experience in sales or operations, internship ok</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong writing skills and is comfortable communicating with external customers</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with sales channel backends ( Shopify, Facebook/IG Shop, Pipedrive) is a plus.</p> </li> </ul> <p>How to Apply:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Resume</p> </li> <li> <p>Cover letter</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant</a></p> Mon, 11 May 2026 14:27:47 +0000 Wed, 10 Jun 2026 14:27:47 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant Infiniti Group Ltd: Entry Level Junior Trader (Remote) Anywhere in the World Merseyside Cryptocurrency All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5128/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Infiniti Group Ltd <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://infinitiownerclub.com">https://infinitiownerclub.com</a> </p> <p><strong>Application link</strong>: <a title="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely" href="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely">https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely</a><br><br></p> <div class="vacancy-intro reveal reveal-delay-2 is-visible"> <p>Infiniti Group operates at the crossroads of digital assets, analytical market research, and algorithm-informed trading methods. We are dedicated to building a team of motivated beginners who want hands-on exposure to financial markets and real trading situations.</p> <p>We are looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Junior Crypto Trader</strong>&nbsp;— a role designed for those at the very start of their professional journey.
